body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. `TestNoLiveHarnessExecInDefaultSuite` still passes after the migration and continues to guard the default suite.","coverage":"child 3 AC2-3"},{"parent_ac":"2. `TestRunVirtualWithInlineResponses`, `TestRunVirtual`, `TestExecuteBeadCheckpoint.*`, `TestExecuteBeadRoutingEvidence.*`, and `TestWorkConcurrentAttempts.*` pass after the non-live fixtures are moved to the hermetic boundary.","coverage":"child 1 AC1-3; child 2 AC1-3; child 3 AC1-3"},{"parent_ac":"3. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/agent -run '^(TestNoLiveHarnessExecInDefaultSuite|TestRunVirtualWithInlineResponses|TestRunVirtual|TestExecuteBeadCheckpoint.*|TestExecuteBeadRoutingEvidence.*|TestWorkConcurrentAttempts.*)$' -count=1 -timeout 30s` passes.","coverage":"child 1 AC4; child 2 AC4; child 3 AC4"},{"parent_ac":"4. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","coverage":"child 1 AC5; child 2 AC5; child 3 AC5"}],"child_ids":["ddx-59417f33","ddx-fefba834","ddx-1f1c3f0f"],"rationale":"Split by fixture family so each child can be implemented and verified independently while preserving the default-suite hermeticity boundary, guard coverage, labels, and the parent verification contract."}
